subcodes.first_line: O My beloved! Verily, We have loved thee from before, and We love thee now, and We shall love thee hereafter, and We have never wavered in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حبیب انا قد کنا احبک من قبل و نحبک حینئذ و سنحبک من بعد و ما کنا فی شان
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
